text: The Rust programming language is fast and memory safe.
Iron and steel can rust when left out in the rain.
Memory safety prevents many classes of bugs in systems code.
A car engine burns fuel to generate mechanical power.
Ownership and borrowing are core concepts in Rust.
Borrowing money from a bank requires a good credit score.
Cargo is the package manager and build tool for Rust.
Ships and boats are also called vessels or watercraft.
Asynchronous programming in Rust uses futures and executors.
Marine vessels carry cargo across oceans for global trade.
Banks assess credit risk before approving a loan.
Zero-cost abstractions make Rust both expressive and fast.
